title: Love Over Night
writer: George Dromgold, Sanford Hewitt, John W. Krafft (titles)
actors: Rod La Rocque, Jeanette Loff, Richard Tucker, Tom Kennedy
plot: Rod La Roque is a subway ticket taker who believes beautiful Jeanette Loff is involved in a robbery but he still falls in love with her and tries to stop her wedding.
